# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin-interface-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15020
      holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        statusPort: 15020
        readinessInitialDelaySeconds: 1
        readinessFailureThreshold: 30
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      rewriteAppHTTPProbe: true
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: expose-envoy-admin
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      listener:
        filterChain:
          filter:
            name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          http_protocol_options:
            accept_http_10: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar-injector
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  values: |
    {
      "global": {
        "proxy": {
          "statusPort": 15020,
          "readinessInitialDelaySeconds": 1,
          "readinessFailureThreshold": 30
        }
      }
    }
  config: |
    policy: enabled
    alwaysInjectSelector:
      []
    neverInjectSelector:
      []
    injectedAnnotations:
    template: |
      metadata:
        annotations:
          sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
      spec:
        containers:
        - name: istio-proxy
          ports:
          - containerPort: 15000
            protocol: TCP
            name: admin
          - containerPort: 15020
            protocol: TCP
            name: status-port
          env:
          - name: ISTIO_META_ADMIN_PORT
            value: "15000"
          - name: ISTIO_META_ENABLE_ADMIN_ENDPOINT
            value: "true"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-routes
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - mesh
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /config_dump
    - uri:
        prefix: /stats
    - uri:
        prefix: /clusters
    - uri:
        prefix: /listeners
    - uri:
        prefix: /ready
    - uri:
        prefix: /server_info
    - uri:
        prefix: /runtime
    - uri:
        prefix: /memory
    - uri:
        prefix: /contention
    route:
    - destination:
        host: localhost
        port:
          number: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin-debug
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
    name: admin
  selector:
    istio: pilot
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15020
    from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access-script
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  access-admin.sh: |
    #!/bin/bash
    POD_NAME=$1
    NAMESPACE=${2:-default}
    ENDPOINT=${3:-config_dump}
    
    if [ -z "$POD_NAME" ]; then
      echo "Usage: $0 <pod-name> [namespace] [endpoint]"
      echo "Endpoints: config_dump, stats, clusters, listeners, ready, server_info, runtime, memory"
      exit 1
    fi
    
    kubectl exec -n $NAMESPACE $POD_NAME -c istio-proxy -- curl -s http://localhost:15000/$ENDPOINT
  README.md: |
    # Envoy Admin Interface Access
    
    ## Available Endpoints:
    - /config_dump - Full Envoy configuration
    - /stats - Envoy statistics
    - /stats/prometheus - Prometheus formatted stats
    - /clusters - Upstream cluster status
    - /listeners - Listener configuration
    - /ready - Readiness status
    - /server_info - Server information
    - /runtime - Runtime configuration
    - /memory - Memory usage
    - /contention - Lock contention stats
    
    ## Usage:
    kubectl exec -n <namespace> <pod-name> -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/<endpoint>
    
    ## Examples:
    kubectl exec -n default my-app-pod -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/config_dump
    kubectl exec -n default my-app-pod -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/stats
    kubectl exec -n default my-app-pod -c istio-proxy -- curl http://localhost:15000/clusters
